violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (floor mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC cleaned/sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026
Inspector observed ROP fish thawing in 2 door cooler at 38F. PIC removed fish from packaging. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026
Inspector observed leak near the water meter area in basement. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2026
Inspector observed the dumpster filled to the top with a pile of trash/boxes outside of establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as produce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated eggs. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer and floor mixer bowl/attachments) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC started cleaning/sanitizing during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

Tomato sauce was observed held at 118 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

Cheese was observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved to another unit. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC washed/sanitized items. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026
Inspector observed leak near the water meter area in basement area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2026
The walk-in cooler is in poor repair (ambient 49F). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outside area behind restaurant. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026
The hand-washing sink in the pizza area AND bathroom were lacking proper hand washing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026
The hand-washing sink in the bathroom was lacking paper towels. PIC replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026
Inspector observed heavy food debris in handwashing sink in the pizza area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as produce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated eggs. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer and floor mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took units out of service to be washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

Various deli meats and cooked foods were observed held between 45-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed of or saved items based on risk. PIC placed out of order sign on walk-in door and called for service during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

Various items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC refilled sink and tested sanitizer. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by outside rat burrows and live rat. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen and walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC removed and washed/sanitized utensils. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026
Single service items were observed stored on the in the basement and kitchen areas. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

Inspector observed painted cardboard pressboard type material with paint missing being used to cover premade pizzas in the walk-in cooler. PIC instructed to end practice. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026
Inspector observed a leak near the water meter in basement area. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2026
Inspector observed the dumpsters filled to the top and a heavy accumulation of trash bags and cardboard in the back outside area. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

The walk-in cooler in the kitchen area is in poor repair. Establishment not to use walk-in cooler for TCS items until serviced AND can maintain TCS items at or below 41F. PIC called for service on site. Service is scheduled for Friday. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed outside (behind restaurant). Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, potato cutter, immersion blender) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took items out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 25 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC added additional chlorine and retested. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Inspector provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the floor mixer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025
Inspector observed leak at hot water heater. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

The dumpster outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed outside (behind restaurant). Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026
